user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends and we want to visit some interesting cities along the way. Can you provide me with the three nearest cities to my current location? Also, give me the details of the largest cities within a 100-kilometer range. Additionally, let me know the current time in each of these cities.

TaskList.description: Find the three nearest cities to the user's current location.
Retrieve details of the largest cities within a 100-kilometer range of the user's location.
Get the current time for each of the cities found in step 1 and step 2.
